title: Software for e-bikes — Comodule: IoT for E-bikes

headers.text: IoT-powered e-bike software for digital cycling experiences
Track, lock and control the e-bike via Companion App
Comodule API and SDK tools for custom e-bike software integration
Integrate Comodule IoT to custom software solutions
Integrate connectivity to your current setup or build it from the scratch
Detailed info and resources atComodule Developer Portal →
Upgrade your current Bluetooth setup and App with IoT
You want to create an app* from scratch

paragraphs: Comodule software connects bikes, riders, and OEMs through seamless, customizable solutions. Its open and flexible system enables bike brands to deliver engaging digital experiences and build stronger connections with their customers.
Market-ready and white-labelled e-bike application and a back-office platform for bike brands to engage with customers, manage data, and control vehicles.
Bluetooth SDK and API tools offer the full capability of Comodule IoT and integrate custom software solutions: End-user applications and OEM backend tools.
Developed and maintained by Comodule’s in-house software team
Customized to your brand
Works seamlessly with Comodule hardware
Periodic feature updates and bug fixes by Comodule
Lower costs and time-to-market compared to custom app

The app is the interface that provides your customers with the smart bike experience. The Comodule feature set* combines hardware capabilities and third-party accessory control with the Companion App features. Comodule ensures your e-bike stays futureproof, evolving with periodic feature updates.
*The exact feature set is defined by the IoT hardware, drive unit integration and chosen 3rd party accessories.
Live Location Sharing
Drive Unit Immobilizer
Bike Recovery Service
In-app Theft Reporting
Access live vehicle usage data
Gain data insights for product design and updates
Perform remote firmware updates
Check bike diagnostics and specific parameters
Filter users by demographics and attributes
Send service reminders and marketing messages via the app
Use API and Bluetooth SDK tools to seamlessly integrate Comodule IoT to custom software solutions
Use the comprehensive connectivity feature set and data provided by Comodule IoT
Use Comodule API and SDK features to develop the app exactly to your needs
Works seamlessly with Comodule hardware and 3rd party accessories
Retrieve up-to-date information on e-bike status, location, and performance metrics.
Adjust e-bike settings and parameters remotely to optimize performance.
Deploy over-the-air firmware updates to ensure devices run the latest software.
Find nearby IoT modules
Quick and dependable connection to module
Read & write multiple values with smart command queue system
Firmware updates to IoT and 3rd party components
Send module and bike component data to cloud
Bluetooth connection to the bike remains via display/controller, using the current SDK
Comodule integrates an IoT module into the bike
The module communicates to Comodule Cloud via cellular network
The connectivity features are communicated between Comodule cloud and your app backend using Comodule API
The user can start using the connectivity features
Comodule integrates an IoT module into the bike
Bluetooth connection is set up via Comodule IoT module, using Comodule SDK
The module communicates to Comodule Cloud via cellular network
The connectivity features are communicated between Comodule cloud and  app backend* using Comodule API
The user can start using the connectivity features via app*
*The communication applies for both Comodule Companion App and Custom App.
Reach out to us through the form below and we’ll get back to you soon.
